overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt running along a forest trail through a mountainous region, encountering wild horses and approaching an ancient stone totem structure with a campsite at its base.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with wildflowers and wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: Geralt jogging steadily along the dirt forest path with swords strapped to his back, moving through the meadow

entered.detail: Dense evergreen trees lining both sides of the trail
Snow-capped mountain visible in the distant background
Weathered wooden posts marking the edge of the path
Colorful wildflowers including yellow and purple blooms along the trail edge
Tall ancient stone monument visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Geralt runs along a wide forest trail surrounded by tall pine trees and wildflower meadows. The path is marked by wooden fence posts, and a distant mountain peak is visible under a partly cloudy sky. The ancient stone totem structure appears far ahead on the horizon.

events.description: two wild horses appear grazing on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, passing by the wild horses grazing peacefully on the right

notable_agents.action: brown horse grazing on grass near the trail, lifting its head as Geralt approaches

segments.scene_description: As Geralt continues running, two wild horses appear grazing on the right hillside. The wooden fence posts fall behind as the path opens up, and the stone totem structure grows larger in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep rocky trail approaching stone monument

events.description: path becomes steeper and rockier as it ascends toward the stone structure

agents.ego_description: climbing the increasingly steep and rocky path toward the tall stone totem, moving into denser forest

entered.detail: Exposed rock faces and boulders lining the steepening path

segments.scene_description: The trail becomes steeper and rockier as Geralt ascends toward the monument. The trees grow denser, creating dappled shade, and the stone totem looms larger ahead. The terrain shifts from grassy dirt to exposed rocky outcrops.

events.description: arriving at the open clearing around the stone totem where a campfire burns and a person sits nearby

agents.ego_description: approaching the massive stone structure and discovering a campsite with a seated individual resting by the fire

notable_agents.action: seated person resting by the campfire at the base of the stone totem

entered.detail: Burning campfire with visible flames near the base of the stone structure
Wooden barrels and crates stacked near the campsite

segments.scene_description: Geralt arrives at the clearing around the massive ancient stone totem. A campfire burns brightly at the structure's base, where wooden barrels are stacked and a person sits resting. The scene opens up to full sky visibility with the monument dominating the center of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a forest trail that transforms from a wide, wildflower-lined path into a rocky ascent toward an ancient monument. It begins with Geralt running past wooden fence posts and tall pine trees under a partly cloudy sky, with a distant stone totem visible on the horizon. As the path opens up, the camera passes two wild horses grazing on a hillside before the terrain shifts from grassy dirt to steeper, rocky outcrops. The scene then moves through denser trees and dappled shade as the monument looms larger, finally arriving at a clearing where the massive stone totem dominates the frame. The movement concludes at the base of the structure, where a brightly burning campfire, stacked wooden barrels, and a resting figure are revealed under the open sky.
